# Intelligence Brief — April 18, 2026

*97 articles across 9 categories*

---

## Executive Summary

The past 24 hours indicate a complex landscape for right-wing and far-right movements, characterized by both ambitious expansion and internal strains. France's **Rassemblement National** is intensifying efforts to court business leaders and participate in transnational anti-immigration rallies, while simultaneously navigating significant internal leadership tensions. The domestic political setbacks faced by **Viktor Orbán**'s **Fidesz** in Hungary suggest that even entrenched right-wing power bases can be vulnerable, prompting a coordinated international response from progressive leaders against the rise of the far-right.

## Electoral Dynamics & Intra-Party Tensions

Across Europe and the United States, right-wing parties are grappling with electoral challenges and internal dynamics. In France, **Rassemblement National (RN)** leader **Jordan Bardella** is campaigning with a confident assertion of an impending presidential victory [[21]](https://news.google.?oc=5), actively seeking engagement with business leaders to discuss economic regulations [[22]](https://news.google.?oc=5). However, the party is reportedly experiencing "du rififi" and "two camps" between **Bardella** and **Marine Le Pen** as the next presidential election approaches [[27]](https://news.google.?oc=5). In Hungary, **Viktor Orbán**'s **Fidesz** suffered significant losses, ceding three symbolic strongholds to the opposition **Tisza** party, leading **Orbán** to acknowledge a need for "complete renewal" within his party [[94]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxNVDA5a2kwWksxQ3FaSjF4SElIMlNKc1pyem5PVnNNRkFEYTNjTUFQbjRHcUR5ZkhMNHkzbUpRWjMyVlpJTnRBM2taZDFFay1hT05zampnbFE3bTNwT19OUHFjVGkxUWg4SGE0b25rbVNXZEYtV3VfRWRCMml4djBRSVZhY2NXdHB3d0FlblVpb05aQXFwck5yX0VmNXVZMldEY2FhSFNPVWJjYjMyRmNfWTlLZWpGRndDLVNuNkZYS2N5Vk41dFNv?oc=5) [[96]](https://news.google.?oc=5). This has been interpreted by some as a potential end to his political era [[95]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWkFVX3lxTE45cURkQXBFRnN3MlB1ZldiX2ZYbmliRGF0YmcxeTVwVnB5NkNFblVpSldRRWRiYTVNdXZ6NG1LdWlULW5SRDhpN0dfMExYZ1JqZ0trd3BFZlhEdw?oc=5).

In the US, **J.D. Vance**'s political activities drew scrutiny, with reports of a "very bad week" and a "bumpy ride" [[3]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikAFBVV95cUxQUURkVWRUVXZFWDhaZ0dEcXJ6QkxmaHdtcHFjejFyR0NCcUZiSndpekV5QklBRjBZU2Y2ZzFlZnJSMnU4NXEtZ2F5WllNRGJKOUZBU1J0T1FkYk5qOTlrMUx4R1V3LXo2d1dsencydGdmRUQwTW1pblFPekhJTERmOVhBUVVNUUd2M1pIWVRMRlM?oc=5) [[4]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMidkFVX3lxTE1Jby02Tk5nLU8tX3REVXB0UFlpcE8xZVprVnZtSkVFRldIeWpVWnVINEJKRGFEWFB4ekMyWl9jRHM5ZWN5MmFKT0pka0NfcHBNclI2TUdOc1ctUzdGOGQ0R3NHQ1BNNEJMcFB2S1Q1WGxfU202cFE?oc=5). Internal fractures within the broader MAGA movement are also emerging, with some elements of the "manosphere" expressing disillusionment with **Donald Trump** [[70]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[76]](https://news.google.?oc=5). The UK's **Reform UK** faced accusations of offensive posts by local election candidates [[43]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxORGEyWGxJT0M5Qm44b3BUZDlPQ2VUWDJlanVuZzJpVUpjSWFlYk5iMldHdW1nOVJRZGZrb2JNMU40Q1NzSUdIQjFYSjk4bVZqdFFsZG5PVUVaSTdNTk93Z1FKN29jNDBYLTF5SjhBY1N2eUd1VlNQRmxMR2drQTJFZER5Ym1sbzJQVV80dlV0X2xVR3lFNEs2ODRxdnBMeTJINFlNcUtjdFBXUDY1ZEMxSU0xZno?oc=5) and internal conflict resulting in the removal of a group leader in Worcestershire [[49]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFBCVDRfZ3hIUW9ld3diUnp6ZmFXVXlJal9jYmxBRmdLanpOVFhEUE15bXhoWGs2T2xHU0hJaEEyelJCZFB2VkdkUUFlZGxMWlVGZjJlSlhFODVGdnNn?oc=5). Despite this, **Nigel Farage** continued to campaign, claiming a shift of former Labour voters towards his party [[48]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxQX1BtMFpwMWw3X1gzNHB2bUd5ZFA3NDVIT2lZZ1BfV2UybVFvd2ZPd01xeFpRQVlfeHdMY052N1FtREs3OG1ZaWRXbGRZaGt2ZGdKOTVuMmd1RXI5MWE1MFZ3WDJnRDNONDRZd0p6cHlybFItVUN0ODJpaFJ5NjR6NHl3LThvdVN1VnpxQ0JjampFcVluZExGbFB3?oc=5). In Norway, **Fremskrittspartiet (FrP)** leader **Sylvi Listhaug** maintains high approval [[18]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5Dck5JVWtGSEhUcTJhNDl2YmFxUjNqQ1RqamZpSWMtLWJYYU1CZklDMUF3MElIVm5aTU5EaTQtOUIyMWc2UDd0b2tNX2N6WjlnMEVOMHVHaV9oemhBSlBxa3dYOA?oc=5), and the party has seen a defection from **Høyre** bolster its ranks [[15]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilAFBVV95cUxNb0MxUWhuejZHVE5iOXZnOHFmVXFzdTdQSjI4RUpiTTlzcWN2YTZ6NkpkNFFPVHotMXVoOUlVZFpRT2RlNmhPalIzdVRTSFo3akhkVzREZ0YtSXVrMjZQNFdPeGxvS2VnWllrb2RvT1VqdHNmQ3dKbDhuamhCeU9TNE1kVXlPUXREY3NXX1VSN20wdkh3?oc=5), though it also navigated cooperation disputes with **Rødt** [[16]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMif0FVX3lxTE1reGhpeGVCUlhvRnRpMUxPWFRrazh0d0ZraG9kN2wtbUdnZFdBSHJUMUpHVC1GRU9uYVItMDJvYjBxRVF5UUs4RXpjS2xGVGswU1I1LVlCeE1FUXBmaThoVk93OHM1RGN1dEJNZ2R1RDRHdmFvWUhGQlcxbGFPYjA?oc=5). Polling in Germany indicates the far-right **AfD** is currently ahead of the conservatives led by **Merz** [[77]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilgFBVV95cUxNdTF5THdIMkUwNGtSbW5iUVJ2b3dNM1RHSDBEOEZDdzZHMUI5X19pVUlSYnA5eDM1emRwNEJqbkg4NVBJWE1BbW84MzNlQWpKMnFleDJ6cEw1RHR5NUVGSHE0eUxBanp3SDZIRmotNURMMUdyZVdBLXNBR0xZeFhKTC1OZ09GQ1pDNXZnS2FfU1h2Rk5rN0E?oc=5).

## Transnational Far-Right Coordination & Ideological Alignment

European far-right leaders are actively coordinating and showcasing ideological solidarity, particularly on immigration. **Jordan Bardella** (**RN**), **Geert Wilders**, and **Matteo Salvini** (**Lega**) are slated to attend an anti-immigration rally in Milan, underscoring a shared "identitarian" platform [[34]](https://news.google.?oc=5). This event, hosted by **Lega**, also serves as a pushback against the EU [[42]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxNWkRJVlJaZWVZZjdTX1hsN0xHbWFMa29zR2swM2VUNFpZWTBmeDR3c3E5MFZJMHdCS1QtQ0VQM3hpazRIRXhjbmliT1h2dXdCeGxFVkRHcWZ3RjNOSFhWNU1xRHcwUDV2d0hfc2tjSWswR0NGbnl1Y2ZSRjM1QTc4M05mUm9PRm1Nb1RJV3E2OUZ4cERoZmZlTEdoUGtldw?oc=5) and proceeds despite **Orbán**'s recent domestic setbacks [[63]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijwFBVV95cUxNNzhWUks0Z1ZhSUpiU2lNYzV5b3R3ancxandXWVE0dU5ZMmJ4Mmw3b3NHeG1iNUJuVzB1QkdQZjdJb19JOGlrX2d4M2tqc3luRXhHOWZBNm8xS2dBeUNSc0J6YlN4dEdFYTBidnBTRzR5TUpRN2w0dnV3SlpFeGdrSnpScXBGTGtiU0Q2SzJ6UQ?oc=5).

While European far-right parties are reportedly keen to "keep their distance" from **Donald Trump** [[83]](https://news.google.?oc=5), **Trump** himself engaged in a face-to-face meeting with **Giorgia Meloni** after a reported "rupture" [[41]](https://news.google.?oc=5). **Trump** also addressed a **Turning Point USA** event, reaffirming his continued influence within American conservative circles [[92]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[93]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwAFBVV95cUxOUV9ZNFZzSmY4YzZMMHlxZl9hOVRwSlFHWUk2RHhxQ3lwakVqVENDZjZpOVJ6dDNJNkswUXl4Y3dSXzNrdUNMS1pVOUs1Vm5MSGJmU2FSSkF1SEpoVXk3NWt1T25USDFNS1NJSVNlX2xOSzRySU0zTnQwZ3gwX3lHcWk5eDVETDBOY0ZwWXRlbFR5dUZWaUJRLVVmTG9VcTF4aDRiWXdMS0F3eDRFbjZUanpEYi1taVM0TXhKREdRVXk?oc=5). Ideologically, **Sverigedemokraterna (SD)**'s support for **Orbán** has drawn strong criticism, being labelled a "historical betrayal" [[19]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxPQ2lBSFg4VHdJVzZwZFV6QTRHXzJtM2stQ0Q5cGdaZkFzbnhFTXpPYk1laGFKOVQ4Q2JYank0UkVxbE1sUk43d3ZrQzdiRXdmYldwcFZjYUVfQUU4U29kY0oxa2VQeTFzeHE4a2NzLXJHNUJ0NzZMUDNwVzhrYUxGdWZwU3BPT0pSTnp2ak11cmNiNUp3SGF6cEk0Y3ZPak1PV0ZfWUJOMXNIOGlJ?oc=5), highlighting the deep connections within the European right. US conservative think tanks like the **Heritage Foundation** continue to produce content shaping foundational conservative thought on issues like judicial supremacy [[85]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqAFBVV95cUxQME9vSmRQU2d5di1JTlIwaGxrWlNtdG10Sy16cHBmS09BLWJwVDl6WEY4Zk5jVFdIN0kzR3UxcVJ6T3Nfd1dQSkduSDN1OUNHMWpmX3V5eWtUYU1fRGZCdFFfSHItSHo1M2J6c0VQQTJuNmZDakxmRHVTcVIyLThHNnJmcjRBZnR5YmFMRUtnMVhRYVVCcTV3TGxEQ1A2LWtLeEwzSU94VXM?oc=5) and gender ideology [[90]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxNX3B4TkpoWXhlWHpXckFJbXBlUzlSbmMtVTFVSWpmVi04VmhfTzFkWVhtc2FVSlRzVkUzR1VHZFN4dFBNZU0wUTdTaWc5SVFDUXZrUzJ1N2RMcjVzbHZrdkI3WUpReTI3TDNjVjNwQmtwV2RueFY3elMwdzN2VXlpVVV4NS05eGtqQnhLbmxOQXV5T1NwQS00TTNyZDdlYlNTUmJiX3QyU1ZzNDVVTDhYUEVXZEU?oc=5), impacting broader right-wing discourse.

## Policy & Governance

Right-wing parties are articulating clear policy stances, particularly in economic and social spheres. **Jordan Bardella** (**RN**) is actively engaging business leaders to identify and address regulations and taxes perceived as hindering wealth creation [[22]](https://news.google.?oc=5), mirroring efforts by **Marine Le Pen** to court "grand patrons" [[32]](https://news.google.?oc=5). The **RN** also emphasized the preservation of EU agricultural policies like PAC and POSEI as "vital" for farmers [[36]](https://news.google.?oc=5). In Norway, **FrP** advocates for limited government, stating, "The state is our servant – not our master" [[12]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxQVXVIaGxpSzg1U0hSajBWcVhnR3ZCX2RpNWZ3U0pwRlMtMUUtTFZfRTIyWXVMeUc5VnR3aURnZGd2T2VxSHFWMy1WaHNrbFlYSTA3Y2ctLTBPZzNpdzZ6NEc4OXgwZ3FiZkxMWHVCb3ptTWZMQS1aN0RQOW40aGtRU1I0U2JpZmhYU2VPVU5tS2FJWEU?oc=5).

On immigration, **Matteo Salvini**'s **Lega**'s decision to hold a rally on Italy's Liberation Day was seen as provocative [[38]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiggFBVV95cUxQZ0dMWFkxTFE5Wm9JdURMWWFyXzBJMHRCVlJYanZTeXpsOFVGY29LTjJEUUxiQ2xQbDlSblZVR0VsQjVhYmxtZmFCd3dZMkw4bW5GaVdtWExfc1MyZFR2QlVuNURLdXY1dFVJdUlzUnFOd1pQM0Z1TVRkM3AwUHdHQk1R?oc=5), while a figure from coalition partner **Forza Italia** openly advocated for migrant integration, creating internal tension [[40]](https://news.google.?oc=5). Environmentally, the former **Trump** administration faced a legal setback as a judge dismissed its attempt to block a Hawaii climate lawsuit [[6]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxPYUNnTklsUWY2S3oxVnRid2JGVUN1MDZHd2VKeW9kNHJPY2lPdFh5aGlKczdtOFlHMXBmY2tDcTBHUzRkWWktOU1HQnhFczlvTUdmWDdEOHNQc2c1RGMwendOcFlvN0dJSmdpRlppaGVCNDlQaGZ5STNWOGtOSmRJZW5yUW5vdTk1U3laZ2s2SVkwN0xCbDZHbzRNeHVjT0UzMmFDNA?oc=5). It was also criticized for expediting offshore mining leases without consulting Indigenous communities [[9]](https://news.google.?oc=5).

## Cultural Warfare & Social Issues

The "manosphere" continues to be a focal point in the cultural discourse, with growing concerns about its influence on younger generations and the fragmentation of families [[51]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiigFBVV95cUxOeFJSLUFTOWFXWTRTMnRqek1STktTTmJVR21GWWdCVXMxZGVVcWtKMERWX2ZWRVZZMUFlWUVhbW9ZVUxSaFg1RDg5SjJSc05aalhOc1BhZTFDWF9JMkR6REVYVjNZVmFmZ0FNUXNJOVJIbG43a0Y2bEpTQmg4dzZKOXFINUtnZ2w5cGc?oc=5) [[65]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[66]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxQUUk5c2lYVTYzQ0lUWFZOYW03YVE2LTVzQ1hTMDZJNjk0ZUYwWVhwYnpSMU1IWFMxZ3UzNkR4M0ZWN2hOZ2hVamxscnJoU1ZJb2pkVlFRVmEyVHo1ZWdkVlBsVGxzZW5pejFUV3BGbElOZld6YVR3S25tU2R2cGp5aTNxZlUxM09nUnpPM3k3QVZhSTdRNmZjU0p6bnVsYjN1SVhGMWZfQnN0Wl83VGtfaA?oc=5) [[69]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMibkFVX3lxTFB4b1B0SS1WVlRsS2tkX0dXVUNJNWhRRWVLcldWaG93SGpRMzZWdlNaQ19fbngwRUNmNnhNOWktdEkzeEZhVlJ1TGYwU045SWpZUnE5RTJ5WjNJSnRvOEh0LXpBaWVDYS1DOEVpbG13?oc=5). Public figures, including actor **Theo James**, have criticized the "meaningless bravado" associated with the manosphere [[79]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxQTXpRcFVJX2Y4U0Q4WTRqVXB0WFBHQ09wUGhvbEozaEdzdXd5RnZxaFVaMnd3MTN2QlNzbHVrRFBMbXo0V1B2bHFWb25lTEhxaEV3ZlRLQTAyZURrUldsbXZERXlhbU5nX1BmV0xwdkNDb3pVeExIUmZzYUI0VXJ6Q2E4dWlXR3NORHgzcXFXMVhHbEl0VTdiQ2I0LU1DQQ?oc=5). Religious rhetoric, particularly that employed by the **Trump** administration, is reported to be "backfiring" [[8]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxNdTJVVm5JNVNjWWpvemJPa1lEZlJ2am9OUGJlcHI4ZGZyVG16dk9OVEV4RnRfQ19TUFRvVEEyTUZJSTZvV0JIMk1UZ25pWEN5ZEZoY0hDazNGR1Z0RzhFbHhsamNoYWFvdURJRHhtVUs3M0toczlJUzdIOVBKNWNPTHByUkhtYUpBYmI3d1lWZGJKSkk3RW1lX3VPSkZ0SHV4b0w1RHFWMURlSVJ0dGZpZWZma3dCWVE0M3ZB?oc=5), with analyses exploring the intertwining of faith and MAGA politics [[1]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinAFBVV95cUxQR1BxQ2JCTmFmNWRBZFRzOVNKYmo4b2hkOFA5Njg0Z0RFcy1tY3FzZnEzNjJXanVaMXZDOEpyaVRrdW1LdUZpTDlGZ1ZjcUFETTU3cUFrNkx3dDR0RmJKYTZMWjJsdkJ3anpyTnJmTnlaSHRJTl9YaG5kS3lNdlg5SDJTdjJIRWRPWGlRTUlWQTBqOVRLcU9rRDVkVFI?oc=5). Concerns about a potential "return of fascism" and authoritarianism are also being voiced [[67]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxQYVdIV1RpUTgyWnR3d3BKam52Zkc0LTFsZTFpdVZiRzBoN2tCMDA1VEhGS2RkX1UwUjFndWdfNHpDTVVZblpuM3M4RVdGeFVINUJFa3FwbkhDcWkwMEg2Unc0SWVDaUt3WXhFNFpKTnZYUkNEbEZNb2ktejNRM1dmXzhuMUMwWGZub19ndDRDU2Y3T3ltelQ5dmtvbFdObGlMSnNpWjE1WXExc2c?oc=5), spurring counter-initiatives like a new podcast dedicated to "Fighting Fascism" [[78]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMid0FVX3lxTE5uM2JYaDFfNHdrN2NrN2JrUkpCQlBCc09rVG1LSURuR240cWxWUDJNU21RV2RZeGltYkI5M0ZKWlZoeUVXNHA3TGtscHFJdmpGV0staXk5XzVqemw5aEcxblNoZzZkeVcwT0M5TWR6UUpNdmtpYXJJ?oc=5). In a high-profile incident, celebrity **Sharon Osbourne** lost ties with a homelessness charity following her apparent support for a far-right rally associated with **Tommy Robinson** [[52]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimwFBVV95cUxPaDhHY29PNDlSb3Bkem1wSGc3b2dPci0zQ1RjQjEwOE9pLWRWbTN5TjVVOTBRaF9Ka0JXMFRVTUhqcmJ2OVdua2tBNDdCb2JzajVYYTdidnQteVM5TWltWW96U3FZbks2Y2F6bU9yelJTaUJEMjRBcGVvalljV3pVOERwTXlDcmJRajlicTBhUElJZXNRRDktaE8yMA?oc=5) [[58]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxPN0ZkRmJQaVdSTTRsQ09BZ1h2bGEwZ3hfTjZlY05VNXpqeVhfQTJPTnZaM1pwVzNzSlZlWmJVWWY1Q3d1eFJLc2M1RDFRdWplZjJmYXcxZEQ0YzlZd2gwSjN0QzBJTWpIZE1WZFRkejNwUlhNaGJ6Z3oyNTdibnNZMXhsWC1rSnpqeS1zZm1MUE1XWDh3cDVQNWNIeUFaWjRLdDB3UTF1b1UtVEhQeFQ4?oc=5) [[60]](https://news.google.?oc=5), highlighting the reputational risks associated with extreme right affiliations. Separately, a Polish far-right MP was penalized for displaying a swastika on an Israeli flag, revealing blatant extremism within political discourse [[82]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxQR0pldkxUWElyUnhiTlplT2pfRWdfTDBPTDFaN19qT2xLR1I2MUpoRzB4RVNKdUd4NzRwM1ZQSmpZbDV3d0MzNHEzTVhiOHdUUERqRUUwa3ZCZGVjNG0yQzBjN2tFcHlvY2RqMXRYSjYzQ05NTjlZRDg0QkpmWHhhQklZajZkakFnTTBZaTllZjV1NU04dkpsXzZB?oc=5).

## Public Image, Outreach & Opposition

Right-wing movements are strategically managing their public image and engaging in targeted outreach. **Jordan Bardella**'s highly publicized relationship with **Maria Carolina de Bourbon des Deux-Siciles** [[24]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[26]](https://news.google.?oc=5) generated extensive media coverage, potentially aimed at broadening the **RN**'s appeal. Both **Bardella** and **Marine Le Pen** are actively cultivating relationships with the business community [[22]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[32]](https://news.google.?oc=5), indicating a concerted effort to appear economically credible. **FrP**'s campaign for "children to get their childhood back" [[17]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxPSDVsV2FMWE0zU0xEczlPeDBLdDV6bUpaaHlnNlAzMkVkRzV3YkN4SF9ydmFtSkdlUXY1cEhvZ2NaM05lZ0ZtbzZPaTg2RFVVMkFxSnRfMDZJQVpwU1l0bGRBSGVNZ3c0cW1DN2xCNXo5QURfTGVQWFcxVWswa0FPU05YVGtnSFYwYzVRanpSSndrZkNza1FHRkFENTNPYUk3dVpoVGMtU0U4Z2JQa1E?oc=5) appeals to traditional family values.

Concurrently, there is a significant, coordinated opposition from leftist leaders globally. **Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez** and **Brazilian President Lula da Silva** led a summit in Barcelona, uniting leaders from the Global South and Europe to rally against the rise of the far-right, advocating for democracy and social justice [[54]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigAFBVV95cUxNdE5HQmV6bWlDeEQ0S0YzcGp4eXNVcXNOQ2s5Q1NzNnNndVRBQ1d2UjljQ3BEbEtnRDM2dVJ0LXVnME9kbXhPTmdXSjVFeDZwa2FZdVk3c3ZnNzlKSXdmX2ZGclJ1NVdOTC1Md1hGd0lOZXRlQmF4dnVCVnZpLTRIOQ?oc=5) [[59]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxNZWVyZVp5R21KdkFMNmZ1TnRDbnpQU0c2NzVVeUNRSjdTZmZqTWg3RXhjemJ1Q0k0bDdGLUFwYVAwd1o2ZUtNclFTeUROR2owN3YtUDgwbFZpaWxPbUlsSnpqdVNiSVNkVFZySDduY2NvZk1WZDlINEFxM0djYzhoTVQ5LVlQTnJyckM1bi1iNzVLaDItTHJMZTBKc1RRemtSZTZWdmhfUHQ3ZVZudGZ3?oc=5) [[71]](https://news.google.?oc=5) [[72]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFBTaU11UU5Gc2ExbmNZcURWbDlhZHlFS3A0MzhvbFI2ejBBaEFKQjVqQnVHNjczUVZhNjlzYzJLNkNvdm93dkFrdnJMeEJFbDktcjRzTkVLZHNYa0N2?oc=5). This counter-mobilization signifies a growing international effort to resist the advances of right-wing and far-right movements.

## Watchlist

1.  **RN Leadership Dynamics**: Continued monitoring of the reported internal tensions between **Jordan Bardella** and **Marine Le Pen** [[27]](https://news.google.?oc=5) will be critical to assessing the **Rassemblement National**'s stability and future presidential campaign strategy.
2.  **Impact of Hungarian Elections**: The extent of the **Tisza** party's disruption to **Fidesz**'s dominance in Hungary [[94]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxNVDA5a2kwWksxQ3FaSjF4SElIMlNKc1pyem5PVnNNRkFEYTNjTUFQbjRHcUR5ZkhMNHkzbUpRWjMyVlpJTnRBM2taZDFFay1hT05zampnbFE3bTNwT19OUHFjVGkxUWg4SGE0b25rbVNXZEYtV3VfRWRCMml4djBRSVZhY2NXdHB3d0FlblVpb05aQXFwck5yX0VmNXVZMldEY2FhSFNPVWJjYjMyRmNfWTlLZWpGRndDLVNuNkZYS2N5Vk41dFNv?oc=5) [[96]](https://news.google.?oc=5) will be important to track, as it may signal a shift in the perceived invincibility of illiberal right-wing governments in Central Europe.
3.  **Transnational Far-Right Cohesion**: The outcomes and attendance at the Milan anti-immigration rally [[34]](https://news.google.?oc=5) will provide insight into the current strength and unity of the European far-right bloc, particularly as some parties attempt to distance themselves from figures like **Donald Trump** [[83]](https://news.google.?oc=5).
---

94.
